plugins.name: e2e-test-playwright
plugins.description: Comprehensive E2E browser testing skill leveraging Playwright MCP and superpowers plugin. Adapted from Cole Medin's e2e-test skill — replaces agent-browser with Playwright MCP for native Windows support and delegates planning, parallel agents, code review, and verification to superpowers.
